metadata.description: A harness for reproducible, STAMPED-aligned data-science research. Workflow-plane planner skills (project, analyze) delegate to capability-plane doers (datalad, datalad-cli, nipoppy-cli) so every research object is Shareable, Tracked, Actionable, Metadata-rich, Provenanced, Executable, and Distributable.

plugins.name: project
plugins.description: Project lifecycle planner: scaffold a new YODA/BIDS DataLad study and orient a researcher (coordinator agent) on where a project stands.

plugins.name: govern
plugins.description: Governance planner (Manage & Comply lane): preregister freezes a comparison's spec before execution and registers it as a confirmatory obligation; obligations tracks and resolves the project's outstanding commitments in the ledger.

plugins.name: analyze
plugins.description: Analysis planner: propose comparisons on their own branch, run them with full (optionally containerized) provenance, and checkpoint clean snapshots.

plugins.name: datalad
plugins.description: DataLad doer: the tool subagent that executes all DataLad / git-annex operations with provenance on behalf of the planner skills.

plugins.name: curate
plugins.description: Curation planner: the annotate skill enriches a dataset's metadata (dataset_description.json, participants.json data dictionary, BIDS sidecars, controlled-term mappings) with provenance, advancing STAMPED Metadata + Actionable.

plugins.name: process
plugins.description: Processing planner: run nipoppy pipelines (fMRIPrep, MRIQC, ...) on BIDS data with full DataLad provenance, then record completion. Orchestrates the nipoppy and datalad doers.

plugins.name: disseminate
plugins.description: Dissemination planner: publish committed dataset state to a sibling (git + annexed content) and verify an independent clone can retrieve the outputs (STAMPED-D).

plugins.name: nipoppy
plugins.description: Nipoppy doer: the tool subagent that constructs/validates nipoppy pipeline commands and hands dataset-mutating steps to the datalad doer for provenanced execution.

plugins.name: archive
plugins.description: Archive doer: deposits a released version to an external archive (OSF/Zenodo/DataCite) and mints a persistent DOI; reports 'unminted' rather than fabricating one when credentials are absent.

plugins.name: datalad-cli
plugins.description: DataLad skill toolbox: 19 focused skills wrapping individual datalad subcommands (create, run, save, container-run, siblings, push, ...).

plugins.name: nipoppy-cli
plugins.description: Nipoppy skill toolbox: dataset curation, BIDS conversion, pipeline running/tracking, and IDP extraction for neuroimaging studies.
